name: ALPHA MODUS HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: PART I References in this section to we, our, us, and Alpha Modus generally refer to Alpha Modus, Corp. prior to the Business Combination and to Alpha Modus Holdings, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries after giving effect to the Business Combination. References to Legacy Alpha Modus generally refer to Alpha Modus, Corp., and references to the Company generally refer to Alpha Modus Holdings, Inc.
